stemHtml: Holders of a pilot licence with privileges to fly aeroplanes or TMGs shall only tow sailplanes or banners when they…

options.a: Have at least 100 hours of flight time and 200 take-offs and landings as PIC.
options.b: Hold the appropriate sailplane towing or banner towing rating.
options.c: Have at least 30 hours of flight time as PIC on aeroplanes.
options.d: Hold an IR in the appropriate aircraft category.
